name: SEO & GEO AI Agent Skills
description: A collection of 20 specialized SEO and GEO skills tailored for AI agents like Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and 35+ others, enabling keyword research, content writing, technical SEO audits, rank tracking, and application of CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks.

inputs.name: keyword_list
inputs.description: Keywords or phrases for research, analysis, and content generation.

inputs.name: content_text
inputs.description: Text content for SEO optimization, writing, or auditing.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: Target URL for technical SEO audits or rank tracking.

inputs.name: geographical_data
inputs.description: Location-specific data to tailor GEO SEO tasks.

inputs.name: rank_tracking_params
inputs.description: Parameters for tracking keyword rankings over time.

outputs.name: keyword_insights
outputs.description: Analysis results including search volume, competition, and opportunity scores.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: SEO-enhanced text content generated or revised according to best practices.

outputs.name: audit_report
outputs.description: Technical SEO audit results highlighting issues and recommendations.

outputs.name: rank_tracking_report
outputs.description: Tracking data showing current and historical keyword rankings.

outputs.name: seo_strategy_recommendations
outputs.description: Actionable guidance based on CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks.

patterns: Automated content generation with SEO optimization
Technical SEO auditing recognizing common issues
Applying CORE-EEAT framework for credibility and expertise in content
Utilizing CITE framework to improve citation and referencing quality
Geo-targeted SEO adjustments based on location data
steps: Collect keywords and/or content input from the user or system
Perform keyword research to analyze search intent and competition
Generate or optimize content applying SEO best practices and CORE-EEAT + CITE guidelines
Conduct a technical SEO audit on the specified website URL
Track keyword rankings and monitor changes over time
Generate detailed reports and recommendations for SEO improvements
Incorporate GEO-specific data to customize SEO strategies regionally
use_cases: Generating SEO-optimized articles and marketing content
Conducting in-depth keyword research for targeted campaigns
Performing technical SEO audits to identify website issues
Monitoring SEO rank progress for multiple keywords
Implementing SEO strategies that adhere to expertise, authoritativeness, and trustworthiness
Customizing SEO approaches for geographic locations

prompt_templates.name: keyword_research
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following keywords for search volume, competition, and relevancy: {keyword_list}

prompt_templates.name: content_writing
prompt_templates.template: Write SEO-optimized content on the topic '{topic}' that aligns with CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks.

prompt_templates.name: technical_audit
prompt_templates.template: Perform a technical SEO audit on the website at: {website_url} and list SEO issues and recommendations.

prompt_templates.name: rank_tracking
prompt_templates.template: Provide current and historical rankings for the keywords {keyword_list} targeting the region {geographical_data}.

prompt_templates.name: seo_strategy
prompt_templates.template: Based on the following data: {input_data}, generate SEO strategy recommendations using CORE-EEAT and CITE best practices.
